Hub Home > ai-setup-and-automation > AI Implementation Roadmap

AI Implementation Roadmap

Create a phased 90-day plan for adopting AI across your business — identifying quick wins, building team capability, and scaling what works. Includes budget allocation, success metrics, training milestones, and risk mitigation for each phase.

Expert MULTI-STEP WORKFLOW Strategic
Pro tip

Be honest about your team's current AI experience and resistance levels. The best roadmaps account for change management, not just technology.

ai adoption implementation roadmap digital transformation change management strategy planning

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are an AI implementation strategist for small businesses. Build me a practical 90-day AI adoption roadmap.

<company_profile>
Business type: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
Team size: [NUMBER]
Annual...
You are an AI implementation strategist for small businesses. Build me a practical 90-day AI adoption roadmap.

<company_profile>
Business type: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
Team size: [NUMBER]
Annual...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

You are an AI implementation strategist for small businesses. Build me a practical 90-day AI adoption roadmap.

<company_profile>
Business type: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
Team size: [NUMBER]
Annual revenue: [RANGE]
Current AI usage: [none / basic (ChatGPT for writing) / moderate / advanced]
Biggest time wasters: [LIST 3-5 MANUAL TASKS THAT EAT YOUR WEEK]
Team AI comfort: [resistant / cautious / curious / eager]
Monthly AI budget: [AMOUNT]
Existing tools: [list your current software stack]
</company_profile>

Build a 90-day roadmap with three phases:

**Phase 1: Quick Wins (Days 1-30)**
- 3-5 specific AI implementations that deliver visible results in week one
- Exact tools to use, cost, and setup time for each
- Success metrics to measure impact
- Team training plan (who learns what, how)

**Phase 2: Build Capability (Days 31-60)**
- Workflow automations that connect Phase 1 tools
- Team skill-building milestones
- Process documentation requirements
- Budget reallocation based on Phase 1 results

**Phase 3: Scale What Works (Days 61-90)**
- Advanced implementations based on Phase 2 learnings
- Custom AI workflows or agents specific to my business
- ROI assessment framework
- Decision criteria for what to expand, modify, or drop

For each item include: specific tool, cost, setup time, owner, success metric, and risk mitigation.

Account for change management — not just technology. Include team communication touchpoints and resistance management strategies.
Notes: This is an agentic prompt — Claude will ask clarifying questions if context is thin. Fill out the company profile thoroughly to get a roadmap you can actually execute, not generic advice.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as an AI implementation strategist who has helped 100+ small businesses adopt AI successfully. You focus on practical results, not hype.

Build me a 90-day AI adoption roadmap.

My business:
-...
Act as an AI implementation strategist who has helped 100+ small businesses adopt AI successfully. You focus on practical results, not hype.

Build me a 90-day AI adoption roadmap.

My business:
-...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Act as an AI implementation strategist who has helped 100+ small businesses adopt AI successfully. You focus on practical results, not hype.

Build me a 90-day AI adoption roadmap.

My business:
- Type: [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
- Team size: [NUMBER]
- Revenue: [RANGE]
- Current AI use: [none / basic ChatGPT / moderate / advanced]
- Top time wasters: [3-5 manual tasks eating my week]
- Team attitude toward AI: [resistant / cautious / curious / eager]
- Monthly AI budget: [AMOUNT]
- Current tools: [software stack]

Three phases:

Phase 1 (Days 1-30): Quick wins — 3-5 AI implementations with visible results in week one. Tools, cost, setup time, training plan, metrics.

Phase 2 (Days 31-60): Build capability — connect tools into workflows, build team skills, document processes, adjust budget.

Phase 3 (Days 61-90): Scale — advanced implementations, custom workflows, ROI assessment, expand/modify/drop decisions.

For every item: tool name, cost, setup hours, who owns it, success metric, and what can go wrong.

Include change management — communication plan, resistance strategies, team milestones. Not just tech.
Notes: Create a shared ChatGPT conversation with your team leads and have them each describe their biggest time wasters directly. ChatGPT will synthesize across all inputs for a more complete roadmap.
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro

**Team size:** [NUMBER]
**Revenue:** [RANGE]
**Current AI usage:** [none /...

**Team size:** [NUMBER]
**Revenue:** [RANGE]
**Current AI usage:** [none /...

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Build me a 90-day AI adoption roadmap for my small business.

**Business type:** [YOUR_BUSINESS_TYPE]
**Team size:** [NUMBER]
**Revenue:** [RANGE]
**Current AI usage:** [none / basic / moderate / advanced]
**Biggest time wasters:** [3-5 manual tasks]
**Team AI comfort:** [resistant / cautious / curious / eager]
**Monthly AI budget:** [AMOUNT]
**Current tools:** [list]

Research the most effective AI tools for my business type and budget, then build:

Phase 1 (Days 1-30): Quick wins — 3-5 tools with week-one results. Include cost, setup time, training, metrics.
Phase 2 (Days 31-60): Capability building — workflow connections, team skills, process docs, budget reallocation.
Phase 3 (Days 61-90): Scale — advanced AI, custom workflows, ROI assessment, expand/drop decisions.

Each item needs: tool, cost, setup time, owner, success metric, risk mitigation.
Include change management strategies for the team.
Notes: Gemini can research real-time AI tool pricing and capabilities to make recommendations grounded in current offerings. Ask follow-ups like "What are the cheapest alternatives to [tool] for [use case]?" to optimize the budget.

Revenue: [RANGE]

Enter your email to unlock this prompt

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Help me create a 90-day AI adoption plan for my business.

Business: [TYPE]
Team: [NUMBER]
Revenue: [RANGE]
Current AI use: [none / basic / moderate / advanced]
Biggest time wasters: [3-5 tasks]
Team attitude: [resistant / cautious / curious / eager]
AI budget: [AMOUNT/month]
Current tools: [list]

Build three phases:
Phase 1 (Days 1-30): Quick wins — 3-5 AI implementations with week-one results
Phase 2 (Days 31-60): Connect and build — workflow automations, team training, process docs
Phase 3 (Days 61-90): Scale — advanced implementations, ROI review, what to keep/drop

For each item: tool, cost, setup time, owner, metric, risks.
Include team communication and change management plan.
Notes: Copilot can integrate the roadmap directly into Microsoft Planner or Project for task tracking. Ask it to create a Planner board with the 90-day phases as buckets and each implementation as a task.
